basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website home.iitd.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. Relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: First-class M.Sc./M.Tech. (or equivalent) in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, or a related field, with a minimum of 60% marks (or CGPA 6.0/10) and qualification in CSIR-UGC NET, DBT-BET, ICMR-JRF, GATE, or equivalent
qualification.details: First-class M.Sc./M.Tech. (or equivalent) in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, or a related field, with a minimum of 60% marks (or CGPA 6.0/10) and qualification in CSIR-UGC NET, DBT-BET, ICMR-JRF, GATE, or equivalent. Desirable: Prior hands-on experience with animal model systems (zebrafish or mice preferred). Experience in molecular biology, tissue culture, histology, immunofluorescence/imaging, and gene/protein expression analyses will be an advantage.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: First-class M.Sc./M.Tech. (or equivalent) in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, or a related field, with a minimum of 60% marks (or CGPA 6.0/10) and qualification in CSIR-UGC NET, DBT-BET, ICMR-JRF, GATE, or equivalent. Desirable: Prior hands-on experience with animal model systems (zebrafish or mice preferred). Experience in molecular biology, tissue culture, histology, immunofluorescence/imaging, and gene/protein expression analyses will be an advantage.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. Relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 24th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First-class M.Sc./M.Tech. (or equivalent) in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, or a related field, with at least 60% marks and a valid qualification in CSIR-UGC NET, DBT-BET, ICMR-JRF, GATE, or equivalent.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA @ 27%.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow post at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position through email.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, a 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to SC/ST candidates. Specific age limits are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
